tagline: AI Engineer — LLM Systems · Legal AI · Workflow & Agent Platform
bio: AI Engineer building production LLM systems and AI workflow/agent platforms for legal document intelligence. Shipped contract review AI (patent-registered), a self-serve playbook platform, and a LangGraph-based workflow engine covering legal brief drafting, contract authoring, comparison review, and regulatory compliance. Designed contract analysis benchmarks and trained domain-specific models deployed in production. Contributed 4 merged PRs to predibase/lorax.
heroSubtitle: Building production AI systems — from contract review to agentic workflows for legal professionals
